The '''Bendu Statue''' was a statue on [[Ando Prime/Legends|Ando Prime]]. It was quite worn and there was a ramp beneath it. It was the obvious route on most Ando Prime [[Podracing/Legends|podrace]] courses.<ref name="SWE1R" />
